# W3 Sourcing

> Human-led executive recruitment for VC-backed technology, legal, banking, and finance teams across the US, UK, EU, UAE, and Asia.

W3 Sourcing helps founders, funds, and leadership teams hire senior operators with principal-led judgment, discretion, and fit.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://w3sourcing.com/
- Sitemap: https://w3sourcing.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://w3sourcing.com/robots.txt
- Privacy: https://w3sourcing.com/privacy
- Terms: https://w3sourcing.com/terms

## Core Topics

- Executive search
- Executive recruitment
- VC-backed company hiring
- Technology leadership recruitment
- Legal recruitment
- Banking and finance recruitment
- Global talent sourcing

## Contact

- Email: info@w3sourcing.com
